## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update

## HIPAA Compliance Checklist

- [ ] All patient data is handled in a HIPAA-compliant manner.
- [ ] No PHI is logged or stored in insecure systems.
- [ ] Access to PHI is strictly controlled and audited.
- [ ] All data transmission is encrypted.
- [ ] I have read and understood the company's HIPAA policies.
